  1. org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.config
  2. RouteProperties

Uses of Class
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.config.RouteProperties

Packages that use RouteProperties
Package
Description
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.config
Package that contains implementation of creating RouterFunctions from external configuration.
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.filter
Package that contains implementations of FilterFunctions.
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.handler
Package that contains advanced classes for adapting WebMVC.fn to an API Gateway.
